name: Earth — Charlevoix Field
description: A gravel airstrip on the north shore of the St. Lawrence, three hundred kilometers downriver from the crater where Québec City used to be. The Duskway's receiving end: floodlights that only come on when a ship is already committed, and people who unload fast and don't ask names. Above it, the blockade — a Compact cordon that calls itself a reconstruction protection zone.

extra.note: The space around this location IS the blockade corridor — the run itself. The patrols are the cordon; the dock beacon is the landing window.
